creator: svysh.fbsd@gmail.com
text:
- Update 12.57 -> 12.58
  Changes: https://exiftool.org/history.html

- "portlint -AC" is happy.
- "portclippy Makefile" is happy.
- "portfmt -D Makefile" is happy.
- Tested with:
13.1-RELEASE-p7
portlint 2.20.0
portfmt 1.1.4
pkg 1.19.0
poudriere 3.3.7_1
perl 5.32.1_3
openssl 1.1.1o
ssl=base
- built-in perl tests in a clean poudriere jail say: PASS.
